name: Suspicious VMToolsd Child Process Detected
description: An unusual child process was spawned by VMware Tools (vmtoolsd.exe), potentially indicating malicious code execution or persistence by an attacker within a virtualized environment.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp when the suspicious child process was created.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the suspicious process was created.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process (expected to be vmtoolsd.exe).

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the suspicious child process executable.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line arguments of the child process.
